evals.prompt: Unit test fails with AssertionError: expected 42 but got 0. The test calls calculateTotal. Find the root cause before proposing a fix.
evals.expected_behavior: Reads the full error and stack, reproduces, traces data flow and recent changes or setup differences, forms a hypothesis, verifies with a minimal test or comparison, states the root cause clearly (e.g. setup not running), and only then proposes the minimal fix.
assertions: Does not propose a fix before root cause is understood and stated
Compares failing vs. passing case or inspects setup/recent changes
Uses one hypothesis at a time and documents outcome

evals.prompt: A feature that worked yesterday is broken after the last commit. Systematically find why.
evals.expected_behavior: Uses git log/show to identify the change, compares before/after, forms and tests a hypothesis about the root cause (removed line, config change, etc.), verifies, and only then proposes the restoration or fix.
assertions: States root cause in terms of the specific change
